# workspace-core

Core workspace and session operations for repository-centric coding tasks.

## Included Skills
- `workspace-operator`: repository navigation, context diagnostics, file/session state checks.
- `session-hygiene`: cleanup/rewind/resume flows while preserving useful context.

## Legacy command focus
`add-dir`, `files`, `diff`, `context`, `clear`, `status`, `stats`, `resume`, `rewind`, `doctor`, `session`, `terminal-setup`.
